title: Hellshade
body:
# 😈 Hellshade Resource Pack  
### 1.21+

![Screenshot of texture pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29bcabf822103b36672ff57fc7ab178ad065b851.png)

---

## 🔥 Description

Hellshade is a dark and intense red-themed resource pack inspired by infernal and hellish aesthetics.  

Designed to preserve the core structure of vanilla Minecraft while adding a bold and aggressive visual style, Hellshade enhances contrast, clarity, and atmosphere — especially for Competitive PvP (CPvP).

The deep crimson tones and sharp visuals create a powerful combat-focused experience without overwhelming the original Minecraft feel.

---

## ⚔️ Features

- Dark red / hell-themed color palette  
- Improved PvP visibility  
- Clean and smooth textures  
- Enhanced contrast for combat  
- Vanilla-friendly design  

---

## ⬇️ How to Install

1. Download the `.zip` file  
2. Move it into your `.minecraft/resourcepacks` folder  
3. Launch Minecraft → Options → Resource Packs  
4. Enable **Hellshade** and enjoy 😈
